tasks.description: Navigate to https://instanthydration.com/a/account/subscriptions/1a09d410-7669-48a9-82e7-3e4fd5b33f2f and cancel the monthly subscription. Use Chrome CDP to open the page, click More > Cancel, and complete the cancellation flow.

Navigate to https://www.linkedin.com/messaging/ using Chrome CDP. Once loaded, scroll down the conversation list until no more messages arrive.

For each conversation:
1. Click to open it and capture the URL
2. Analyze the message content
3. If it's someone trying to sell something or is generic spam, mark it read
4. If it's important/personal, add to the results table

Display results using update_widget (NOT show_widget) with:
  title: 'linkedin_inbox'
  html: <table with columns: Name, Summary, Link>

The table links should be clickable and open in the default browser.

Read .pi/skills/specteron-brand/WIDGET-TEMPLATE.md for styling requirements.

After completing, call complete_task with id "linkedin-inbox-cleaner".
